name_cn:
Celine New Moon Bag - Monogram
Made of top-grain cowhide with classic PVC
Perfect blend of vintage and modern trends
Showcasing classic brand elements
Adorned with the Arc de Triomphe gold buckle💎
Practical yet stylish
Dimensions: 22×7.5×17cm
